steps.title: Identify what the goal requires
steps.content: The student wants to “specify how much” — this demands a specific QUANTITY. The notes provide exactly one measurement: 21 mg per 100 g of ascorbic acid (vitamin C).

steps.title: Choose the answer that includes the quantity
steps.content: B includes the specific measurement: “21 mg of vitamin C in every 100 g of blackberries.” The other three omit the amount — A shifts to animal physiology, while C and D discuss vitamin C without quantifying it. That matches choice B — B is correct.
